creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
Have you tried native joystick support in games/flighgear rather than emulating keyboard+mouse via xf86-input-joystick, joytran, antimicro, etc.? See /usr/local/share/flightgear/Input/Joysticks/ThrustMaster/

> Do we have any evdev(4) driver in FreeBSD?

In kernel since base r305706 but uhid(4) still lacks support for it; in userspace via multimedia/webcamd but generic USB HID driver hasn't been ported.
